children.text: this title;

children.label: B
children.text: title 14;

children.label: C
children.text: the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps Act of 2002 ( et seq.); or33 U.S.C. 3001

children.label: D
children.text: the Public Health Service Act ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 201

children.label: i
children.text: first becomes a member of a uniformed service on or after ; orJanuary 1, 2018

children.label: ii
children.text: makes the election described in section 1409(b)(4)(B) or 12739(f)(2) of this title; and

children.label: B
children.text: does not retire or separate under chapter 61 of this title.

children.heading: .—Retirement age
children.label: 3 .—Retirement age
children.text: The term “retirement age” has the meaning given the term in section 216() of the Social Security Act (()).ll42 U.S.C. 416

children.heading: Election of Lump Sum Payment of Certain Retired Pay.—
children.label: b Election of Lump Sum Payment of Certain Retired Pay.—
i
children.text: 50 percent of the amount of such covered retired pay during such period; or

children.label: ii
children.text: 25 percent of the amount of such covered retired pay during such period; and

children.label: i
children.text: in the case of an eligible person electing to receive an amount described in subparagraph (A)(i), 50 percent of the amount of monthly covered retired pay the eligible person is otherwise entitled to receive during such period; and

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of an eligible person electing to receive an amount described in subparagraph (A)(ii), 75 percent of the amount of monthly covered retired pay the eligible person is otherwise entitled to receive during such period.

children.label: A
children.text: estimating the aggregate amount of retired pay the person would receive for the period, taking into account cost-of-living adjustments under projected by the Secretary at the time the person separates from service and would otherwise begin receiving covered retired pay; andsection 1401a of this title

children.label: i
children.text: using average personal discount rates (as defined and calculated by the Secretary taking into consideration applicable and reputable studies of personal discount rates for military personnel and past actuarial experience in the calculation of personal discount rates under this paragraph); and

children.label: ii
children.text: in accordance with generally accepted actuarial principles and practices.

children.heading: .—Timing of election
children.label: 3 .—Timing of election
children.text: An eligible person shall make the election under this subsection not later than 90 days before the date of the retirement of the eligible person from the uniformed services.

children.heading: .—Single payment or combination of payments
children.label: 4 .—Single payment or combination of payments
children.text: An eligible person may elect to receive a lump sum payment under this subsection in a single payment or in a combination of payments.

children.label: A
children.text: Not later than 60 days after the date of the retirement of the eligible person from the uniformed services.

children.label: i
children.text: the date on which the eligible person attains 60 years of age; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the date on which the eligible person first becomes entitled to covered retired pay.

children.heading: .—No subsequent adjustment
children.label: 6 .—No subsequent adjustment
children.text: An eligible person who accepts payment of a lump sum under this subsection may not seek the review of or otherwise challenge the amount of the lump sum in light of any variation in cost-of-living adjustments under , actuarial assumptions, or other factors used by the Secretary in calculating the amount of the lump sum that occur after the Secretary pays the lump sum.section 1401a of this title

children.heading: .—General rule
children.label: 1 .—General rule
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), an eligible person who makes an election described in subsection (b)(1) shall be entitled to receive the eligible person’s monthly covered retired pay calculated in accordance with paragraph (2) after the eligible person attains the eligible person’s retirement age.

children.heading: .—Restoration of full retirement amount at retirement age
children.label: 2 .—Restoration of full retirement amount at retirement age
children.text: The retired pay of an eligible person who makes an election described in subsection (a) shall be recomputed, effective on the first day of the first month beginning after the person attains the eligible person’s retirement age, so as to be an amount equal to the amount of covered retired pay to which the eligible person would otherwise be entitled on that date if the annual increases, in the retired pay of the eligible person made to reflect changes in the Consumer Price Index, had been made in accordance with .section 1401a of this title

children.heading: .—Payment of Retired Pay to Persons Not Making Election
children.label: d .—Payment of Retired Pay to Persons Not Making Election
children.text: An eligible person who does not make the election described in subsection (b)(1) shall be paid the retired pay to which the eligible person is otherwise entitled under the applicable provisions of law referred to in subsection (a)(1).

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: e .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations to carry out the provisions of this section.
